subtasks.description: Implement automatic format conversion to modern formats like WebP and AVIF.
subtasks.details: Configure format conversion to automatically serve WebP/AVIF with appropriate fallbacks. Optimize image quality settings for animal photography that balances emotional impact with performance. Set up format detection for browser compatibility.

subtasks.title: Create Animal Gallery Component
subtasks.description: Develop a performant gallery component for showcasing rescued animals and success stories.
subtasks.details: Build a gallery component with proper lazy loading, optimized for donor engagement. Include metadata for each animal (name, story, status) that loads efficiently. Implement proper image prioritization within the gallery based on storytelling importance.

subtasks.title: Implement Before/After Slider Component
subtasks.description: Create an interactive before/after slider to showcase animal rehabilitation progress.
subtasks.details: Develop a slider component that efficiently loads both before/after images with proper optimization. Ensure smooth performance even with multiple sliders on a single page. Include appropriate loading states and fallbacks for slower connections.

subtasks.title: Build Lightbox Functionality
subtasks.description: Implement a lightbox feature for detailed viewing of animal images while maintaining optimization.
subtasks.details: Create a lightbox that loads higher resolution images only when needed. Implement proper focus management for accessibility. Ensure trauma-informed content warnings appear appropriately in expanded view for sensitive rescue images.

subtasks.title: Optimize Emergency Appeal Image Loading
subtasks.description: Implement specialized image loading for emergency fundraising appeals with critical visibility needs.
subtasks.details: Configure priority loading for emergency appeal images to improve Largest Contentful Paint metrics. Implement special handling for urgent rescue imagery that balances emotional impact with performance. Create a system for staff to easily mark images as high-priority for emergency situations.

tasks.title: Build SEO Foundation with Meta Tags and Structured Data
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive SEO optimization with dynamic meta tags, Open Graph, and JSON-LD structured data
tasks.details: Create SEO component with dynamic meta tag generation, implement Open Graph and Twitter Card optimization, add JSON-LD structured data for articles and organization. Configure automatic sitemap generation and robots.txt. Set up canonical URLs and proper heading hierarchy.
tasks.testStrategy: Validate meta tags with social media debuggers, test structured data with Google Rich Results Test, verify sitemap generation, and confirm search engine indexing

subtasks.title: Dynamic Meta Tag Generation
subtasks.description: Implement a system to dynamically generate meta tags based on content, ensuring trauma-informed content handling and donor trust-building.
subtasks.details: Use a template engine to populate meta tags with relevant content information.

subtasks.title: Open Graph Optimization
subtasks.description: Optimize Open Graph tags for social media sharing, focusing on clear and compelling content summaries.
subtasks.details: Ensure Open Graph tags are correctly formatted and include essential metadata.

subtasks.title: Twitter Card Setup
subtasks.description: Configure Twitter Cards to enhance tweet engagement with visually appealing and informative content previews.
subtasks.details: Validate Twitter Card setup using Twitter's validation tool.

subtasks.title: JSON-LD Structured Data Implementation
subtasks.description: Add JSON-LD structured data to enhance search engine understanding of content, including schema for emergency appeals.
subtasks.details: Use schema.org vocabulary to define content types and relationships.

subtasks.title: Sitemap Generation and Submission
subtasks.description: Automatically generate and submit sitemaps to search engines to ensure comprehensive indexing of dynamic content.
subtasks.details: Use tools like Google Search Console to monitor sitemap submissions.

subtasks.title: Robots.txt Configuration
subtasks.description: Configure robots.txt to control crawler access, ensuring sensitive content is protected while allowing indexing of relevant pages.
subtasks.details: Test robots.txt configuration using tools like Google's robots.txt tester.

subtasks.title: Canonical URL Implementation
subtasks.description: Implement canonical URLs to prevent duplicate content issues and ensure consistent indexing of preferred versions.
subtasks.details: Verify canonical URLs are correctly set and respected by search engines.

tasks.title: Implement Search Functionality
tasks.description: Add client-side search with Fuse.js for content discovery across all content types
tasks.details: Install Fuse.js 7.0+, create search index from all content metadata, build SearchDialog component with keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+K). Implement search result highlighting, content type filtering, and recent searches. Add search analytics tracking for query optimization.
tasks.testStrategy: Test search accuracy across content types, verify keyboard shortcuts, validate result highlighting, and confirm search performance with large content volumes

subtasks.title: Install and Configure Fuse.js
subtasks.description: Install Fuse.js in the project and configure it for optimal performance with large content volumes, ensuring compatibility with trauma-informed content handling and privacy requirements.
subtasks.details: Use npm or yarn to install Fuse.js. Set up configuration options such as threshold, keys, and includeScore to balance accuracy and speed. Ensure the configuration supports searching across sensitive and trauma-related content fields.

subtasks.title: Create and Optimize Search Index
subtasks.description: Generate a JSON search index from the foundation's content, including trauma-sensitive fields, donor information, and emergency appeals, with efficient structure for Fuse.js.
subtasks.details: Extract relevant content from the CMS or database, ensuring trauma-informed content is flagged or categorized. Optimize the index for size and search speed, possibly using caching strategies for large datasets.

subtasks.title: Develop Search Dialog Component
subtasks.description: Build a user-friendly search dialog that integrates Fuse.js, supports trauma-informed messaging, and provides clear feedback for sensitive or emergency content.
subtasks.details: Design the dialog to be accessible and visually distinct for emergency appeals. Include messaging or warnings for trauma-related results. Ensure the component is responsive and works across devices.

subtasks.title: Implement Keyboard Shortcut for Search
subtasks.description: Enable a global keyboard shortcut (e.g., Ctrl+K or Cmd+K) to open the search dialog, ensuring accessibility and non-intrusiveness for users who may be in distress.
subtasks.details: Add event listeners for the chosen shortcut. Ensure the shortcut does not conflict with assistive technologies or other accessibility features.

subtasks.title: Integrate Result Highlighting
subtasks.description: Highlight matched terms in search results, with special handling for trauma-related or emergency content to avoid triggering users.
subtasks.details: Use Fuse.js's match data to highlight terms. For trauma-sensitive results, use subtle highlighting or provide opt-in visibility for graphic content. Ensure highlighting builds donor trust by clearly showing why results are relevant.

subtasks.title: Implement Content Filtering and Safe Search
subtasks.description: Allow users to filter results by content type (e.g., news, emergency appeals, educational resources) and enable a safe search mode for trauma-sensitive content.
subtasks.details: Add UI controls for filtering. Implement logic to exclude or blur trauma-related content unless the user opts in. Clearly label emergency appeals and donor-related content.

subtasks.title: Add Recent Searches Feature
subtasks.description: Track and display recent searches, ensuring privacy for trauma-related queries and transparency for donor trust.
subtasks.details: Store recent searches locally (e.g., in localStorage) with options to clear history. Do not persist or expose trauma-sensitive queries. Provide clear messaging about data handling.

subtasks.title: Integrate Search Analytics and Monitoring
subtasks.description: Implement analytics to monitor search usage, popular queries, and emergency appeal engagement, while respecting user privacy and trauma-informed best practices.
subtasks.details: Send anonymized search data to analytics platforms. Track engagement with emergency appeals and donor-related content. Exclude or anonymize trauma-sensitive queries to protect users.

tasks.title: Create Newsletter Signup Integration
tasks.description: Build newsletter signup components with email validation and CRM integration for supporter engagement
tasks.details: Create NewsletterSignup component with email validation using Zod, implement integration with ConvertKit/Mailchimp API, add subscriber segmentation for different content interests. Include GDPR compliance features and double opt-in confirmation. Add success/error state handling.
tasks.testStrategy: Test email validation, verify API integration, confirm subscriber segmentation, and validate GDPR compliance features

subtasks.title: Design and create newsletter signup component
subtasks.description: Create a simple, user-friendly signup form component that collects essential information while maintaining a clean interface
subtasks.details: Develop a responsive form component with minimal required fields (email at minimum). Include clear value proposition in the copy explaining what subscribers will receive. Ensure the design aligns with the animal protection foundation's branding and incorporates trauma-informed visual elements that avoid potentially triggering imagery of animal suffering.

subtasks.title: Implement email validation system
subtasks.description: Create robust email validation to ensure collected addresses are valid and reduce bounce rates
subtasks.details: Build client-side validation for proper email format. Implement server-side validation to verify domain existence. Create user-friendly error messages that guide users to correct input errors without frustration. Consider implementing a real-time validation indicator to improve user experience.

subtasks.title: Develop GDPR compliance features
subtasks.description: Ensure the newsletter signup process adheres to GDPR requirements for data collection and processing
subtasks.details: Add explicit consent checkbox with clear language about data usage. Include links to privacy policy and terms of use. Store consent records with timestamps. Implement data access and deletion capabilities to honor user rights. Create specific messaging that builds trust with potential donors by explaining how their information will be protected.

subtasks.title: Create subscriber segmentation system
subtasks.description: Develop a system to categorize subscribers based on interests and engagement levels
subtasks.details: Design optional fields or preference selection for subscribers to indicate interests (rescue stories, donation opportunities, volunteer needs, etc.). Create database schema to store and manage these preferences. Implement logic to categorize subscribers based on their engagement patterns. Include emergency appeal tagging to quickly identify subscribers who have opted to receive urgent fundraising requests.

subtasks.title: Build double opt-in confirmation flow
subtasks.description: Implement a secure double opt-in process to confirm subscriber intent and improve list quality
subtasks.details: Create confirmation email template with clear branding and action button. Develop secure token generation for confirmation links. Build confirmation landing page with trust-building messaging about the foundation's animal protection work. Implement logic to move subscribers from 'pending' to 'confirmed' status upon verification.

subtasks.title: Integrate with email service provider API
subtasks.description: Connect the signup form to the foundation's email marketing platform via API
subtasks.details: Research and select appropriate API endpoints for subscriber addition. Implement secure API authentication. Create error handling for failed API calls with appropriate user feedback. Build logging system to track successful/failed submissions for troubleshooting. Ensure the API integration supports tagging for emergency appeals and donor segmentation.

subtasks.title: Implement state management and analytics
subtasks.description: Develop comprehensive state handling for the signup process and implement conversion tracking
subtasks.details: Create state management for form submission process (idle, submitting, success, error). Implement analytics tracking to measure conversion rates at each step of the signup process. Build A/B testing capability to optimize form performance over time. Create dashboard for foundation staff to monitor signup metrics with special attention to trauma-informed content performance and emergency appeal response rates.

tasks.title: Build Donation Integration Components
tasks.description: Create seamless donation flow components with multiple payment methods and emergency appeal functionality
tasks.details: Build DonationButton and DonationModal components, integrate Stripe Payment Links and PayPal for global accessibility, create emergency appeal banner system with urgency indicators. Implement donation amount suggestions and recurring donation options. Add donation impact calculators.
tasks.testStrategy: Test payment flow completion, verify international payment methods, validate emergency appeal triggers, and confirm donation tracking accuracy

subtasks.title: Design and Implement Donation Button and Modal Components
subtasks.description: Create accessible, trauma-informed donation button and modal UI components that encourage trust and ease of use for donors. Ensure content and design are sensitive to animal protection and trauma-informed best practices.
subtasks.details: Include clear calls to action, trust-building language, and visual cues that align with the foundation's mission. Modal should support both one-time and recurring donation flows.

subtasks.title: Integrate Stripe Payment Processing
subtasks.description: Implement Stripe integration for secure donation processing, supporting both one-time and recurring donations. Ensure PCI compliance and donor data privacy.
subtasks.details: Configure Stripe API, handle payment errors gracefully, and provide clear feedback to donors. Ensure trauma-informed messaging in error and success states.

subtasks.title: Integrate PayPal Payment Processing
subtasks.description: Add PayPal as an alternative payment method, supporting both one-time and recurring donations. Maintain consistent user experience and trust-building content.
subtasks.details: Implement PayPal API, ensure seamless switching between payment providers, and handle all edge cases with trauma-informed messaging.

subtasks.title: Develop Emergency Appeal Banner Functionality
subtasks.description: Create a dynamic emergency appeal banner that can be activated during urgent campaigns. Ensure messaging is trauma-informed and builds donor trust.
subtasks.details: Banner should be easily updatable by non-technical staff, highlight urgent needs, and link directly to the donation modal with pre-filled emergency appeal context.

subtasks.title: Implement Donation Amount Suggestions
subtasks.description: Provide suggested donation amounts based on donor data and campaign needs, with trauma-informed explanations of impact for each amount.
subtasks.details: Allow for custom amounts, display impact statements, and ensure suggestions are sensitive to donor capacity and animal protection context.

subtasks.title: Enable Recurring Donation Options
subtasks.description: Allow donors to set up recurring donations with clear, trust-building explanations of how ongoing support helps animals in need.
subtasks.details: Support flexible frequencies (monthly, quarterly, yearly), easy management/cancellation, and transparent communication about recurring commitments.

subtasks.title: Develop Impact Calculators
subtasks.description: Create interactive calculators that show donors the tangible impact of their gift, tailored to animal protection outcomes and trauma-informed storytelling.
subtasks.details: Integrate with donation modal, use real data to estimate outcomes (e.g., number of animals helped), and ensure messaging is empowering and sensitive.

subtasks.title: Comprehensive Testing (Unit, Integration, and User Acceptance)
subtasks.description: Test all donation flows, payment integrations, emergency banners, and calculators for usability, accessibility, trauma-informed content, and security.
subtasks.details: Include edge cases, error handling, and real-world scenarios. Involve stakeholders to validate trauma-informed and trust-building aspects.

subtasks.title: Implement Analytics and Reporting
subtasks.description: Set up analytics to track donation conversions, recurring signups, emergency appeal performance, and impact calculator usage. Ensure donor privacy and ethical data handling.
subtasks.details: Integrate with existing donor database, provide actionable insights for fundraising optimization, and report on trauma-informed content effectiveness.

tasks.title: Develop Impact Metrics Dashboard
tasks.description: Create real-time impact metrics display with transparency indicators and progress tracking
tasks.details: Build ImpactDashboard component with animated counters, create progress bars for funding goals, implement real-time data integration with field operations database. Add geographic impact mapping and timeline visualization. Include financial transparency indicators and third-party verification badges.
tasks.testStrategy: Test metric accuracy, verify real-time updates, validate geographic mapping, and confirm transparency indicator functionality

subtasks.title: Animated Counter Implementation
subtasks.description: Develop animated counters to display key impact metrics (e.g., animals rescued, funds raised) with smooth transitions and trauma-informed messaging to avoid distressing users.
subtasks.details: Ensure counters are visually engaging but sensitive to the subject matter. Collaborate with content experts to craft language and animation speed that respects trauma-informed principles.

subtasks.title: Progress Bar Creation
subtasks.description: Design and implement progress bars to visualize campaign goals, emergency appeals, and ongoing initiatives, ensuring clarity and accessibility.
subtasks.details: Progress bars should clearly indicate progress toward specific goals (e.g., fundraising targets, animals treated) and be adaptable for emergency appeal scenarios.

subtasks.title: Real-Time Data Integration
subtasks.description: Integrate real-time data feeds from internal and external sources to update dashboard metrics, counters, and progress bars automatically.
subtasks.details: Establish secure connections to data sources, implement data validation, and ensure updates are reflected instantly without page reloads.

subtasks.title: Geographic Mapping
subtasks.description: Develop interactive maps to display the geographic distribution of impact, such as rescue locations, shelter sites, and emergency response zones.
subtasks.details: Maps should support real-time updates, allow filtering by event type, and use trauma-informed icons and color schemes to avoid distress.

subtasks.title: Timeline Visualization
subtasks.description: Create timeline visualizations to show the progression of key events, campaigns, and emergency responses, emphasizing transparency and donor engagement.
subtasks.details: Timelines should be interactive, allow users to explore past and ongoing activities, and highlight milestones relevant to donor trust-building.

subtasks.title: Transparency Indicators
subtasks.description: Implement visual indicators (e.g., info icons, tooltips) that provide context on data sources, methodology, and impact verification to foster donor trust.
subtasks.details: Ensure indicators are easily accessible, concise, and reinforce the foundation’s commitment to transparency and ethical reporting.

subtasks.title: Verification Badges
subtasks.description: Design and display verification badges for data points and achievements that have been independently audited or verified.
subtasks.details: Badges should be visually distinct, explain their significance, and be placed near relevant metrics to enhance credibility.

subtasks.title: Comprehensive Testing and Quality Assurance
subtasks.description: Conduct thorough testing of all dashboard components, including trauma-informed content handling, real-time updates, accessibility, and emergency appeal functionality.
subtasks.details: Test for usability, data accuracy, performance under load, and compliance with trauma-informed and donor trust-building requirements. Address feedback from stakeholders before launch.

tasks.title: Implement Social Sharing Optimization
tasks.description: Add comprehensive social sharing with platform-specific optimizations and tracking
tasks.details: Create SocialShare component with platform-specific sharing (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, WhatsApp), implement dynamic Open Graph image generation, add sharing analytics tracking. Include content-specific sharing restrictions for Level 3 content and emergency appeal amplification features.
tasks.testStrategy: Test sharing across all platforms, verify Open Graph image generation, validate sharing restrictions, and confirm analytics tracking

subtasks.title: Develop Social Sharing Component Architecture
subtasks.description: Design and implement the core social sharing component, ensuring modularity for integration with various platforms and support for trauma-informed content handling.
subtasks.details: Establish the base structure for sharing, including UI/UX considerations for sensitive content and donor trust-building messaging.

subtasks.title: Implement Platform-Specific Sharing Optimizations
subtasks.description: Customize sharing logic and UI for each major social platform (Facebook, Twitter/X, Instagram, WhatsApp, etc.), ensuring compliance with their APIs and best practices.
subtasks.details: Optimize metadata, preview formats, and sharing flows for each platform, including fallback mechanisms for unsupported features.

subtasks.title: Automate Open Graph and Social Image Generation
subtasks.description: Develop a dynamic image generation service for Open Graph and other social preview images, incorporating branding, trauma-sensitive overlays, and emergency appeal visuals.
subtasks.details: Ensure images are generated on-demand with appropriate messaging and visual cues for emergency appeals and sensitive content.

subtasks.title: Integrate Analytics and Sharing Event Tracking
subtasks.description: Implement analytics hooks to track sharing events, platform engagement, and conversion metrics, with special attention to donor trust and emergency appeal performance.
subtasks.details: Configure analytics to differentiate between standard and emergency shares, and to monitor the impact of trauma-informed content restrictions.

subtasks.title: Develop Content Restriction and Trauma-Informed Logic
subtasks.description: Create logic to restrict or modify shareable content based on trauma-informed guidelines, legal requirements, and donor trust considerations.
subtasks.details: Implement content filters, warnings, and opt-in mechanisms for sensitive material, ensuring compliance with organizational policies.

subtasks.title: Enable Emergency Appeal Amplification Features
subtasks.description: Build specialized sharing flows and UI for emergency appeals, prioritizing urgency, reach, and donor trust-building elements.
subtasks.details: Integrate rapid deployment tools for emergency campaigns, including pre-approved messaging and visual assets.

subtasks.title: Testing and Documentation
subtasks.description: Conduct comprehensive testing (unit, integration, and user acceptance) and produce detailed documentation for all social sharing features, including trauma-informed and emergency appeal workflows.
subtasks.details: Ensure all edge cases are covered, document platform-specific behaviors, and provide guidelines for future maintenance and updates.

tasks.title: Configure Analytics and Performance Monitoring
tasks.description: Set up comprehensive analytics with Vercel Analytics, Google Analytics, and Core Web Vitals monitoring
tasks.details: Install Vercel Analytics and Google Analytics 4, configure custom events for donation conversions and content engagement, set up Core Web Vitals monitoring with real user metrics. Implement performance budgets and automated alerts for regression detection.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify analytics data collection, test custom event tracking, validate Core Web Vitals reporting, and confirm performance alert functionality

subtasks.title: Set up Vercel Web Analytics
subtasks.description: Enable Vercel Web Analytics for the animal protection foundation platform to track basic visitor metrics
subtasks.details:
1. Enable Web Analytics in the Vercel dashboard by selecting the project and clicking the Analytics tab
2. Add the @vercel/analytics package to the project using the appropriate package manager
3. Integrate the Analytics component into the root layout file of the Next.js application
4. Deploy the application to verify analytics is working by checking for /_vercel/insights/view requests in the browser's Network tab

subtasks.title: Implement donation tracking events
subtasks.description: Create custom event tracking for all donation-related activities on the platform
subtasks.details:
1. Define key donation events to track (donation start, completion, abandonment)
2. Implement custom event tracking for donation amount, frequency (one-time vs recurring), and campaign source
3. Set up conversion funnels to analyze donation completion rates
4. Create custom dashboards to visualize donation patterns and identify optimization opportunities

subtasks.title: Configure content engagement metrics
subtasks.description: Set up tracking for user engagement with foundation content including articles, videos, and campaign pages
subtasks.details:
1. Implement scroll depth tracking to measure how far users read content
2. Add video engagement tracking (play, pause, completion rates)
3. Set up click tracking for call-to-action buttons
4. Create custom events for social sharing actions
5. Develop engagement score metrics to identify most effective content types

subtasks.title: Implement Core Web Vitals monitoring
subtasks.description: Set up monitoring for Core Web Vitals to ensure optimal user experience across the platform
subtasks.details:
1. Configure monitoring for Largest Contentful Paint (LCP), First Input Delay (FID), and Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS)
2. Set up real user monitoring (RUM) to collect performance data from actual visitors
3. Create performance dashboards to visualize Web Vitals metrics over time
4. Establish baseline performance metrics for different page types (homepage, donation pages, content pages)

subtasks.title: Implement performance budgets
subtasks.description: Establish performance budgets for the platform and set up monitoring to ensure compliance
subtasks.details:
1. Define performance budgets for page load time, page size, and number of requests
2. Set up automated testing to verify performance budgets during development
3. Configure CI/CD pipeline to fail builds that exceed performance budgets
4. Create documentation for developers on performance best practices specific to the foundation platform

subtasks.title: Configure performance and analytics alerts
subtasks.description: Set up alerting system for critical performance issues and important analytics events
subtasks.details:
1. Configure alerts for significant drops in donation conversion rates
2. Set up notifications for performance degradations that exceed thresholds
3. Implement alerts for unusual traffic patterns or engagement metrics
4. Create an alert prioritization system to prevent notification fatigue
5. Establish an incident response process for addressing critical alerts

subtasks.title: Create comprehensive analytics documentation
subtasks.description: Develop detailed documentation for the analytics implementation and reporting procedures
subtasks.details:
1. Document all custom events and their parameters
2. Create user guides for accessing and interpreting analytics dashboards
3. Develop training materials for foundation staff on using analytics data
4. Document the alert system and response procedures
5. Create a maintenance plan for regular analytics review and optimization

tasks.title: Build Content Management Workflow
tasks.description: Create Git-based content workflow with preview deployments and approval process
tasks.details: Set up GitHub Actions for automated content validation, create branch-based preview deployments, implement content approval workflow with review assignments based on classification level. Add automated content enhancement (SEO metadata, image optimization) and publication scheduling.
tasks.testStrategy: Test content validation pipeline, verify preview deployment generation, validate approval workflow routing, and confirm automated enhancements

subtasks.title: Set up GitHub Repository Structure
subtasks.description: Create the repository structure with appropriate folders and initial workflow files for the content management system
subtasks.details: Create a new repository for the animal protection foundation's content workflow. Set up the .github/workflows directory to store all workflow configuration files. Initialize basic folder structure for content types (emergency appeals, donor communications, trauma-informed content).

subtasks.title: Implement Content Validation Workflow
subtasks.description: Create GitHub Actions workflow for automated content validation with trauma-informed content guidelines
subtasks.details: Develop a YAML workflow file that triggers on content submission. Configure validation steps that check for trauma-informed language, appropriate imagery references, and content sensitivity. Include automated feedback mechanisms for content creators when validation fails.

subtasks.title: Configure Preview Deployment Pipeline
subtasks.description: Set up automated preview environment deployment for content review
subtasks.details: Create a workflow that generates preview environments for each content submission. Configure the pipeline to deploy content to a staging environment with unique URLs. Implement preview annotations for sensitive content that requires special review attention.

subtasks.title: Develop Approval Workflow Logic
subtasks.description: Implement multi-stage approval process with role-based permissions
subtasks.details: Create a workflow that routes content through appropriate approval chains based on content classification. Configure approval gates for different content types (emergency appeals requiring expedited review vs. standard donor communications). Implement automated notifications for approvers.

subtasks.title: Build Review Assignment System
subtasks.description: Create automated reviewer assignment based on content classification
subtasks.details: Develop a GitHub Action that analyzes content type and automatically assigns appropriate reviewers. Implement logic for trauma-informed content to be routed to specially trained reviewers. Create fallback assignment mechanisms for urgent content when primary reviewers are unavailable.

subtasks.title: Implement Content Enhancement Automation
subtasks.description: Create workflows for automated content improvements and suggestions
subtasks.details: Develop GitHub Actions that suggest improvements to content based on engagement metrics and donor trust-building best practices. Implement automated formatting for emergency appeals to highlight urgency while maintaining sensitivity. Create automated image suggestion system for appropriate visual content.

subtasks.title: Configure Publication Scheduling System
subtasks.description: Implement automated content publication with scheduling capabilities
subtasks.details: Create a workflow that handles the final publication of approved content. Implement scheduling functionality for timed releases. Configure emergency override capabilities for urgent animal welfare situations requiring immediate publication.

subtasks.title: Develop Comprehensive Testing Framework
subtasks.description: Create end-to-end testing for the entire content workflow
subtasks.details: Implement automated tests that validate the entire content workflow from submission to publication. Create test scenarios for different content types including emergency appeals and trauma-informed content. Develop regression testing to ensure workflow changes don't impact existing functionality.

tasks.title: Implement Error Handling and Fallback Pages
tasks.description: Create comprehensive error handling with custom 404, 500 pages and graceful degradation
tasks.details: Build custom 404 and 500 error pages with helpful navigation, implement error boundaries for React components, add graceful degradation for JavaScript-disabled users. Create offline support with service worker for critical content access.
tasks.testStrategy: Test error page functionality, verify error boundary behavior, validate graceful degradation, and confirm offline content access

subtasks.title: Implement Custom 404 Error Page
subtasks.description: Create a user-friendly 404 page that helps users navigate back to valid content while maintaining trust
subtasks.details: Design and implement a custom 404 page that includes: clear messaging about the page not being found, navigation options to key foundation pages, search functionality to help users find what they were looking for, and trauma-informed visuals that align with the foundation's mission. Include animal rescue success stories to maintain positive engagement despite the error.

subtasks.title: Develop 500 Error Page with Recovery Options
subtasks.description: Create a server error page that maintains donor trust while providing clear recovery paths
subtasks.details: Design a 500 error page that includes: apologetic but reassuring messaging, automatic error reporting to development team, alternative ways to complete critical actions (especially donations), contact information for urgent matters, and a clean design that reflects the foundation's professionalism. Ensure the page doesn't display technical details that might confuse users.

subtasks.title: Implement React Error Boundaries
subtasks.description: Set up component-level error boundaries to prevent full application crashes
subtasks.details: Implement error boundaries at multiple levels: a top-level boundary for catching unhandled errors, boundaries around critical donation components, boundaries for content sections displaying potentially triggering rescue content, and custom fallback UIs for each boundary that maintain functionality of unaffected components. Use react-error-boundary library for implementation and ensure all errors are logged for later analysis.

subtasks.title: Develop Graceful Degradation Strategies
subtasks.description: Implement fallback mechanisms for when specific features fail
subtasks.details: Create graceful degradation for: API failures in donation processing with offline collection of information, image loading failures with appropriate placeholders for rescue images, third-party integration failures (payment processors, social media), and content loading issues. Implement retry logic for network requests, especially for emergency appeals and donation processing.

subtasks.title: Implement Offline Support with Service Worker
subtasks.description: Create offline functionality for critical foundation features
subtasks.details: Implement a service worker that: caches essential pages and resources, provides offline access to emergency information, stores donation intents for processing when back online, displays appropriate offline messaging with the foundation's branding, and syncs data when connection is restored. Ensure cached content includes trauma-informed resources that might be needed in emergency situations.

subtasks.title: Create Testing and Documentation Framework
subtasks.description: Develop comprehensive testing and documentation for all error handling implementations
subtasks.details: Create testing procedures for: simulating various error conditions, validating error boundary effectiveness, testing offline functionality, ensuring graceful degradation works as expected, and verifying that error reporting captures necessary information. Document all error handling implementations, recovery procedures, and provide guidelines for content creators on how to create trauma-informed error messages and fallback content.

tasks.title: Configure Security Headers and CSP
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive security headers, Content Security Policy, and protection measures
tasks.details: Configure security headers in next.config.js (HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options), implement Content Security Policy with nonce-based script execution, add Subresource Integrity for external resources. Set up automatic security dependency updates with Dependabot.
tasks.testStrategy: Test security headers with security scanners, verify CSP policy effectiveness, validate SRI implementation, and confirm dependency update automation

subtasks.title: Configure Security Headers in next.config.js
subtasks.description: Set up essential security headers in the Next.js configuration file to protect against common web vulnerabilities.
subtasks.details: Implement headers like X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, and Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS) in next.config.js. Ensure all HTTP traffic is redirected to HTTPS to protect sensitive animal welfare content and donor information.

subtasks.title: Implement Content Security Policy (CSP)
subtasks.description: Create a comprehensive Content Security Policy to control which resources can be loaded by the browser.
subtasks.details: Define allowed sources for scripts, styles, images, and other content with special consideration for trauma-informed animal content. Configure CSP to prevent XSS attacks while allowing necessary resources for emergency appeal functionality.

subtasks.title: Set up Nonce-based Script Execution
subtasks.description: Implement nonce-based CSP for scripts to enhance security while allowing necessary dynamic content.
subtasks.details: Generate cryptographically secure nonces for each request and configure CSP to only allow scripts with valid nonces. Ensure this works with both server and client components while maintaining the foundation's ability to display emergency appeals.

subtasks.title: Implement Subresource Integrity (SRI)
subtasks.description: Add integrity checks for external resources to prevent compromised CDN attacks.
subtasks.details: Add integrity attributes to script and link tags for third-party resources. Ensure SRI implementation doesn't interfere with sensitive animal content delivery or donation processing functionality.

subtasks.title: Configure Dependabot for Dependency Scanning
subtasks.description: Set up automated dependency scanning to identify and address vulnerable packages.
subtasks.details: Create a dependabot.yml configuration file to regularly scan npm dependencies for security vulnerabilities. Configure alerts and automatic pull requests for critical updates to maintain donor trust through proactive security measures.

subtasks.title: Implement Security Testing
subtasks.description: Set up automated and manual security testing procedures for the Next.js application.
subtasks.details: Configure tools like OWASP ZAP for automated scanning. Create test cases for security headers, CSP bypass attempts, and XSS vulnerabilities with special focus on protecting sensitive animal welfare content and donor information.

subtasks.title: Create Security Documentation
subtasks.description: Document all security measures implemented in the Next.js application for the animal protection foundation.
subtasks.details: Create comprehensive documentation explaining the security configuration, including headers, CSP, nonce implementation, and SRI. Include guidelines for developers on maintaining security when adding new features related to trauma-informed content or donation processing.

subtasks.title: Implement Regular Security Scanning
subtasks.description: Set up recurring security scans and monitoring for the production environment.
subtasks.details: Configure regular automated security scans using tools compatible with Next.js. Implement monitoring for unusual traffic patterns that might indicate attacks targeting donor information or attempting to compromise the foundation's reputation through content manipulation.

tasks.title: Build Comment System Integration
tasks.description: Integrate Giscus comment system for community engagement with moderation features
tasks.details: Set up Giscus with GitHub Discussions backend, configure comment moderation settings, implement comment threading and reactions. Add comment notification system for content authors and community management features for sensitive content discussions.
tasks.testStrategy: Test comment posting and threading, verify moderation controls, validate notification delivery, and confirm GitHub integration

subtasks.title: Giscus Setup and Basic Integration
subtasks.description: Configure and integrate the Giscus comment system powered by GitHub Discussions into the website, including OAuth authorization and discussion mapping.
subtasks.details: Set up Giscus with GitHub OAuth for visitor commenting, configure discussion mapping by URL or title, and ensure automatic discussion creation on first comment. Verify multi-language and theme support as needed.

subtasks.title: GitHub Discussions Configuration and Migration
subtasks.description: Configure GitHub Discussions repository settings and migrate any existing comments (e.g., from Disqus) to GitHub Discussions if applicable.
subtasks.details: Set up GitHub Discussions categories and permissions. Use migration tools or scripts to import legacy comments to GitHub Discussions to maintain continuity. Handle GitHub API rate limits during migration.

subtasks.title: Moderation Settings and Trauma-Informed Content Handling
subtasks.description: Implement moderation workflows on GitHub Discussions to handle comment approval, flagging, and removal, with special attention to trauma-informed content policies.
subtasks.details: Define moderation guidelines that respect trauma-informed principles, ensuring sensitive content is handled carefully. Set up GitHub Discussions moderation roles and automate flagging where possible. Train moderators on trauma-informed approaches.

subtasks.title: Comment Threading and Reaction Implementation
subtasks.description: Enable comment threading and reactions within Giscus to facilitate structured discussions and community engagement.
subtasks.details: Configure Giscus to support nested comment threads and allow users to react to comments using GitHub Discussions reaction features. Ensure UI/UX supports easy navigation of threads and reactions.

subtasks.title: Notification System Development
subtasks.description: Develop a notification system to alert users and moderators about new comments, replies, reactions, and moderation actions.
subtasks.details: Integrate GitHub Discussions notifications with website or external notification channels (email, web push). Customize notifications to support donor trust-building by timely updates and emergency appeal alerts.

subtasks.title: Community Management Features and Donor Trust-Building
subtasks.description: Implement community management tools such as user roles, badges, and engagement analytics to foster a trustworthy and supportive environment.
subtasks.details: Add features to recognize active contributors and donors, provide transparency on moderation, and support emergency appeals through pinned posts or highlighted comments. Use analytics to monitor community health.

subtasks.title: Comprehensive Testing and Quality Assurance
subtasks.description: Conduct thorough testing of all comment system features including trauma-informed content handling, moderation, notifications, and community management functionalities.
subtasks.details: Perform functional, usability, and security testing. Validate that trauma-informed policies are enforced correctly and that emergency appeal functionality works as intended. Collect feedback from stakeholders for final adjustments.

tasks.title: Implement RSS Feed Generation
tasks.description: Create automated RSS feed generation for content syndication and subscriber notifications
tasks.details: Build RSS feed generator with content classification filtering, implement multiple feed types (all content, rescue stories only, emergency appeals), add podcast RSS support for audio content. Include proper XML formatting and content excerpts with media enclosures.
tasks.testStrategy: Validate RSS feed XML structure, test feed reader compatibility, verify content filtering, and confirm automatic updates

subtasks.title: Create Basic XML Structure for RSS Feed
subtasks.description: Establish the foundational XML structure for the RSS feed generator with proper encoding and required elements.
subtasks.details: Create an XML template with UTF-8 encoding that includes the essential RSS 2.0 elements: channel tags with title, link, and description. Set up the item structure with title, description, link, and pubDate fields. Ensure proper nesting of elements following RSS specifications.

subtasks.title: Implement Content Classification and Filtering System
subtasks.description: Develop a trauma-informed content filtering mechanism to appropriately classify and tag sensitive animal protection content.
subtasks.details: Create a classification system with categories for different content sensitivity levels. Implement filters to appropriately tag content related to animal abuse, rescue operations, and success stories. Ensure content warnings are properly integrated into the RSS structure for trauma-informed communication. Add category and content rating tags to the XML structure.

subtasks.title: Set Up Multiple Feed Type Support
subtasks.description: Configure the system to generate different feed types based on content categories and donor interests.
subtasks.details: Create separate feed generators for different content types (general updates, emergency appeals, success stories). Implement filtering mechanisms to allow donors to subscribe to specific content categories. Develop a management interface to control which content appears in which feeds. Ensure each feed maintains proper XML structure while varying in content focus.

subtasks.title: Develop Podcast RSS Support
subtasks.description: Extend the RSS implementation to support podcast-specific elements for audio content distribution.
subtasks.details: Add podcast-specific elements to the RSS structure including <itunes:*> namespace tags. Implement duration, episode number, and season fields. Create a system for managing audio file metadata. Ensure compatibility with major podcast directories and platforms while maintaining the foundation's branding and messaging.

subtasks.title: Implement Media Enclosure Handling
subtasks.description: Create functionality to properly include media attachments in RSS feeds for both regular content and podcasts.
subtasks.details: Develop a system to handle various media types (images, audio, video) as enclosures in the RSS feed. Implement proper tagging of media size, type, and URL. Create a content delivery network integration for media hosting. Ensure media descriptions include appropriate sensitivity warnings for potentially distressing animal protection content.

subtasks.title: Conduct Testing and Emergency Appeal Functionality
subtasks.description: Test the complete RSS implementation with focus on emergency appeal functionality and donor trust-building elements.
subtasks.details: Create test cases for all feed types and content categories. Implement and test emergency appeal functionality with priority flagging in the RSS structure. Verify proper handling of sensitive content across different feed types. Test subscription mechanisms and content filtering. Ensure all XML output is valid and compatible with major RSS readers and podcast platforms.

tasks.title: Create Related Content Recommendation System
tasks.description: Build intelligent content recommendation based on tags, categories, and user engagement patterns
tasks.details: Implement content similarity algorithm using tag matching and category relationships, create RelatedContent component with engagement tracking, add user behavior analysis for personalized recommendations. Include content classification awareness to avoid inappropriate suggestions.
tasks.testStrategy: Test recommendation accuracy, verify engagement tracking, validate personalization features, and confirm content classification filtering

subtasks.title: Data Collection and Preparation
subtasks.description: Gather and prepare data for the recommendation system, focusing on trauma-informed content handling
subtasks.details: Collect user interaction data, content metadata, and donor behavior patterns. Clean and transform data into suitable formats. Implement special tagging for sensitive content related to animal trauma to ensure appropriate filtering. Create a data pipeline that respects privacy concerns while capturing necessary behavioral signals.

subtasks.title: Similarity Algorithm Development
subtasks.description: Develop core similarity algorithms tailored for animal protection content
subtasks.details: Research and implement appropriate similarity metrics for content matching. Consider both collaborative filtering and content-based approaches. Develop specialized algorithms that can recognize content sensitivity levels and appropriately match content to user emotional readiness. Include ethical considerations in algorithm design to avoid exploitative content recommendations.

subtasks.title: User Behavior Analysis Framework
subtasks.description: Create a framework to analyze and interpret user engagement patterns
subtasks.details: Develop models to understand user preferences based on browsing history, engagement time, and interaction patterns. Implement behavior clustering to identify donor personas. Create mechanisms to detect emotional responses to different content types, particularly focusing on how users respond to different levels of distressing content.

subtasks.title: Engagement Tracking Implementation
subtasks.description: Build systems to track and measure user engagement with recommended content
subtasks.details: Implement tracking mechanisms for clicks, time spent, donations made, shares, and other engagement metrics. Create a feedback loop system to capture explicit user feedback on recommendations. Design specialized tracking for emergency appeals to measure response rates and optimize future urgent content delivery.

subtasks.title: Content Classification System
subtasks.description: Develop a classification system for animal protection content
subtasks.details: Create a taxonomy for content categories including rescue stories, educational material, donation appeals, and volunteer opportunities. Implement content sensitivity ratings to appropriately tag distressing content. Build automated classification tools using NLP to process and categorize new content as it's added to the system.

subtasks.title: Personalization Engine Development
subtasks.description: Build personalization features that build donor trust and emotional connection
subtasks.details: Develop algorithms that match content to user preferences while respecting emotional boundaries. Create donor journey maps to deliver progressively engaging content. Implement features that recognize donor history and tailor content to acknowledge past contributions, building trust through recognition and appropriate follow-up content.

subtasks.title: Emergency Appeal Functionality
subtasks.description: Implement specialized recommendation features for emergency situations
subtasks.details: Develop override mechanisms for urgent appeals that can temporarily modify recommendation algorithms. Create targeting systems to identify most likely responders to emergency situations. Build notification systems that can appropriately escalate visibility of critical content without causing donor fatigue or emotional overwhelm.

subtasks.title: Testing and Performance Optimization
subtasks.description: Conduct comprehensive testing and optimize system performance
subtasks.details: Implement A/B testing frameworks to evaluate recommendation effectiveness. Optimize algorithms for performance and scalability. Conduct user testing with special attention to emotional responses to recommendations. Develop metrics that balance engagement, donation conversion, and user wellbeing to ensure the system serves both organizational goals and user needs.

tasks.title: Implement Accessibility Compliance Features
tasks.description: Ensure WCAG 2.1 AA compliance with comprehensive accessibility testing and features
tasks.details: Add skip navigation links, implement proper ARIA labels and landmarks, ensure keyboard navigation for all interactive elements, add high contrast mode support. Install axe-core for automated accessibility testing and create accessibility testing checklist for content creators.
tasks.testStrategy: Run automated accessibility audits, test with screen readers (NVDA, JAWS, VoiceOver), verify keyboard-only navigation, and validate high contrast mode

subtasks.title: Implement Skip Navigation Functionality
subtasks.description: Create a skip navigation mechanism that allows keyboard users to bypass repetitive navigation elements and jump directly to main content.
subtasks.details: Develop a visible skip link that appears when focused, ensure it's the first focusable element on the page, and verify it correctly jumps to the main content area. Test with screen readers and keyboard-only navigation to confirm functionality meets WCAG 2.2 AA requirements.

subtasks.title: Implement ARIA Labels and Landmarks
subtasks.description: Add appropriate ARIA roles, labels, and landmarks throughout the website to improve screen reader navigation and understanding of page structure.
subtasks.details: Identify all interactive elements requiring ARIA attributes, implement proper landmark regions (header, main, footer, navigation), ensure all form controls have associated labels, and verify that dynamic content changes are properly announced to assistive technology users.

subtasks.title: Enhance Keyboard Navigation
subtasks.description: Ensure all interactive elements are accessible via keyboard and implement visible focus indicators that meet WCAG 2.2 AA requirements.
subtasks.details: Verify all interactive elements can be accessed and operated using keyboard only, implement focus management for modals and custom widgets, ensure focus indicators meet 3:1 contrast ratio, and test that no content is completely hidden when focused (per WCAG 2.4.11).

subtasks.title: Develop High Contrast Mode
subtasks.description: Create a high contrast display mode that meets WCAG color contrast requirements while preserving the foundation's branding for trauma-informed content.
subtasks.details: Implement a user-toggled high contrast mode, ensure all text meets 4.5:1 contrast ratio (or 3:1 for large text), verify that all UI components and graphics maintain sufficient contrast, and test with users who have low vision or light sensitivity.

subtasks.title: Set Up Automated Accessibility Testing
subtasks.description: Configure automated testing tools to regularly scan the website for accessibility issues, focusing on WCAG 2.2 AA compliance.
subtasks.details: Select and implement appropriate automated testing tools, integrate into CI/CD pipeline, configure tests to check for WCAG 2.2 AA violations, create reporting mechanisms for identified issues, and establish remediation workflows for development team.

subtasks.title: Establish Manual Testing Procedures
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive manual testing protocols for accessibility features, with special attention to trauma-informed content and emergency appeal functionality.
subtasks.details: Develop testing scripts for screen readers, keyboard navigation, and cognitive accessibility; create checklist for trauma-informed content review; establish testing procedures for emergency appeal forms and donation processes; and document testing methodologies for consistent application.

subtasks.title: Create Accessibility Documentation
subtasks.description: Develop comprehensive documentation of all accessibility features, implementation details, and maintenance procedures to support ongoing compliance.
subtasks.details: Document all accessibility features implemented, create maintenance guides for developers, establish accessibility statement for the website, develop troubleshooting resources, and create user guides for accessing accessibility features.

subtasks.title: Develop Content Creator Guidelines
subtasks.description: Create guidelines for content creators that ensure all new content meets accessibility standards while addressing the foundation's needs for trauma-informed content and donor trust-building.
subtasks.details: Develop writing guidelines for trauma-informed content, create templates for accessible emergency appeals, establish image description protocols, provide training materials on accessible content creation, and implement review processes to ensure compliance with WCAG 2.2 AA standards.

tasks.title: Configure Vercel Deployment Pipeline
tasks.description: Set up production deployment with Vercel including environment variables and domain configuration
tasks.details: Configure Vercel project with GitHub integration, set up environment variables for API keys and configuration, configure custom domain with SSL certificates. Set up preview deployments for pull requests and production deployment automation with build optimization.
tasks.testStrategy: Test deployment pipeline, verify environment variable access, validate SSL certificate installation, and confirm preview deployment functionality

subtasks.title: Vercel Project Setup
subtasks.description: Create and configure the Vercel project for the animal protection foundation website
subtasks.details: Create a new project in Vercel dashboard, configure build settings including Node.js version, root directory, and framework settings. Set up the project to prioritize production builds and configure on-demand concurrent builds for better performance.

subtasks.title: GitHub Integration
subtasks.description: Connect GitHub repository to Vercel for automated deployments
subtasks.details: Link the GitHub repository to the Vercel project, configure branch deployment settings, set up shallow cloning with appropriate depth settings, and ensure proper Git workflow for both preview and production deployments.

subtasks.title: Environment Variable Configuration
subtasks.description: Set up secure environment variables for different deployment environments
subtasks.details: Configure environment variables through Vercel dashboard for development, staging, and production environments. Implement secrets management for sensitive information like API keys, database credentials, and donor information. Ensure trauma-informed content handling configurations are properly secured.

subtasks.title: Domain and SSL Setup
subtasks.description: Configure custom domain and SSL certificate for the foundation website
subtasks.details: Add and verify custom domain ownership in Vercel, configure DNS settings, set up SSL certificate installation and renewal, and ensure secure connections for donor trust-building and sensitive content protection.

subtasks.title: Preview Deployment Configuration
subtasks.description: Set up preview deployments for testing changes before production
subtasks.details: Configure Git pushes to pre-production branch to trigger preview deployments, set up a custom subdomain like staging.foundation-name.org, implement environment-specific settings for preview deployments, and ensure trauma-informed content is properly handled in preview environments.

subtasks.title: Production Deployment Automation
subtasks.description: Automate production deployments with proper safeguards
subtasks.details: Configure Git pushes to main branch to trigger production deployments, implement deployment safeguards and rollback procedures, set up emergency appeal functionality deployment protocols, and create documentation for the deployment process to ensure donor trust is maintained during updates.

tasks.title: Build Performance Optimization Pipeline
tasks.description: Implement advanced performance optimizations including bundle analysis and caching strategies
tasks.details: Set up bundle analyzer for JavaScript optimization, implement advanced caching strategies with SWR, configure service worker for offline content access. Add performance budgets in CI/CD pipeline and automated Lighthouse testing for regression prevention.
tasks.testStrategy: Analyze bundle sizes, test caching effectiveness, verify offline functionality, and confirm performance budget enforcement

subtasks.title: Bundle Analyzer Setup
subtasks.description: Install and configure a bundle analyzer tool to identify large dependencies and optimize JavaScript bundle size
subtasks.details: Install webpack-bundle-analyzer or similar tool, integrate it into the build process, generate visual reports of bundle composition, and identify opportunities to reduce bundle size through code splitting

subtasks.title: JavaScript Optimization
subtasks.description: Implement code splitting, lazy loading, and remove unnecessary JavaScript to improve initial load performance
subtasks.details: Break down application code into multiple chunks based on routes/features, implement dynamic imports for non-critical components, remove unused code, and simplify complex selectors to reduce parsing time

subtasks.title: Caching Strategy Implementation
subtasks.description: Develop and implement effective caching strategies for static assets and API responses
subtasks.details: Configure browser caching with appropriate cache headers, implement service worker caching for offline functionality, set up memory/local storage caching for frequently accessed data, and ensure proper cache invalidation mechanisms

subtasks.title: Service Worker Configuration
subtasks.description: Set up service workers to enable offline functionality and improve loading performance for returning visitors
subtasks.details: Register service workers, implement precaching strategies for critical assets, set up runtime caching rules, handle cache updates, and ensure proper fallbacks for offline scenarios with trauma-informed content considerations

subtasks.title: Performance Budget Setup
subtasks.description: Establish performance budgets and monitoring to maintain optimal site performance
subtasks.details: Define performance metrics thresholds (LCP, FID, CLS), integrate budget monitoring into CI/CD pipeline, set up alerts for performance regressions, and create documentation for the team on performance expectations

subtasks.title: Lighthouse Testing Automation
subtasks.description: Implement automated Lighthouse testing in the CI/CD pipeline to continuously monitor performance metrics
subtasks.details: Set up Lighthouse CI, configure testing for critical user journeys (including donation flows and emergency appeals), integrate with GitHub actions or other CI tools, and establish reporting mechanisms for the team

subtasks.title: Regression Prevention System
subtasks.description: Implement safeguards to prevent performance regressions in future development
subtasks.details: Create pre-commit hooks to check bundle sizes, implement automated performance testing for pull requests, establish code review guidelines focused on performance, and develop a process for addressing performance issues

subtasks.title: Documentation and Knowledge Sharing
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive documentation on performance optimization strategies and best practices
subtasks.details: Document all implemented optimizations, create guidelines for trauma-informed content handling, develop best practices for donor trust-building features, establish emergency appeal functionality requirements, and conduct knowledge sharing sessions with the development team

tasks.title: Create Content Creator Documentation
tasks.description: Build comprehensive documentation for content creators including MDX guide and workflow instructions
tasks.details: Create MDX writing guide with component examples, document content classification guidelines and approval workflows, build style guide for consistent content formatting. Include video tutorials for Git workflow and content submission process.
tasks.testStrategy: Test documentation completeness with new users, verify example code functionality, validate workflow instructions, and confirm video tutorial accuracy

subtasks.title: Create MDX Writing Guide
subtasks.description: Develop a comprehensive MDX writing guide tailored for the animal protection foundation's content needs
subtasks.details: Include syntax examples, best practices for trauma-informed content handling, and guidelines for creating emergency appeal content. Document how to properly structure content to build donor trust through transparent communication. Include code examples with proper syntax highlighting.

subtasks.title: Develop Component Examples Documentation
subtasks.description: Create detailed documentation with examples of all available components
subtasks.details: Document each component with visual examples, code snippets, prop tables, and usage guidelines. Include specific examples showing how components can be used for animal welfare content, emergency appeals, and donor engagement. Provide complexity analysis for each component to guide appropriate usage.

subtasks.title: Establish Content Classification Guidelines
subtasks.description: Create guidelines for classifying and tagging content appropriately for the foundation's needs
subtasks.details: Develop a taxonomy for content types including emergency appeals, success stories, educational content, and donor communications. Include guidelines for appropriate content warnings for trauma-informed approaches and sensitivity ratings for different audience segments.

subtasks.title: Document Approval Workflow Process
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive documentation of the content approval workflow
subtasks.details: Map out the entire approval process from content creation to publication, including stakeholder review stages, legal compliance checks, and sensitivity reviews. Include flowcharts, role descriptions, and timeline expectations for emergency vs. standard content.

subtasks.title: Develop Style Guide for Foundation Content
subtasks.description: Create a detailed style guide specific to the animal protection foundation's voice and tone
subtasks.details: Document language guidelines, tone considerations for different content types, image usage policies for animal welfare content, and accessibility requirements. Include examples of appropriate vs. inappropriate content framing, especially for sensitive topics.

subtasks.title: Produce Video Tutorial Series
subtasks.description: Plan and create instructional videos covering all documentation aspects
subtasks.details: Develop scripts, record, edit and publish video tutorials demonstrating the practical application of all documentation components. Include specific tutorials for emergency appeal creation, trauma-informed content development, and effective donor communication strategies.

tasks.title: Implement Emergency Appeal System
tasks.description: Build specialized emergency appeal functionality with urgent notification and rapid deployment features
tasks.details: Create EmergencyAppeal component with countdown timers and progress indicators, implement urgent notification system via email and social media, add rapid content deployment bypass for emergency situations. Include emergency appeal analytics and conversion tracking.
tasks.testStrategy: Test emergency deployment workflow, verify notification delivery speed, validate countdown functionality, and confirm conversion tracking accuracy

subtasks.title: Component Creation for Emergency Appeal
subtasks.description: Design and develop the core emergency appeal component, ensuring it supports trauma-informed content handling and donor trust-building features specific to animal protection emergencies.
subtasks.details: Include fields for urgent needs, transparent use of funds, and survivor-centric messaging. Ensure accessibility and clarity for all users.

subtasks.title: Countdown Timer Implementation
subtasks.description: Develop a countdown timer to highlight the time-sensitive nature of the emergency appeal, emphasizing urgency while maintaining sensitivity to trauma-informed communication.
subtasks.details: Timer should be visually prominent, customizable, and resettable for different appeal durations.

subtasks.title: Progress Indicators Development
subtasks.description: Create real-time progress indicators showing fundraising goals, current donations, and impact metrics to build donor trust and encourage participation.
subtasks.details: Display progress bars, percentage completion, and milestone markers. Ensure transparency and accuracy in reporting.

subtasks.title: Notification System Integration
subtasks.description: Implement a notification system to alert stakeholders, donors, and staff about updates, milestones, and urgent needs related to the emergency appeal.
subtasks.details: Support multiple channels (in-app, SMS, email), allow opt-in/opt-out, and ensure notifications are trauma-informed and non-intrusive.

subtasks.title: Email Integration for Appeals
subtasks.description: Integrate email functionality to send targeted, trust-building communications about the emergency appeal to supporters and donors.
subtasks.details: Automate personalized emails for appeal launch, updates, and thank-yous. Ensure compliance with privacy and consent requirements.

subtasks.title: Social Media Integration
subtasks.description: Enable seamless sharing of the emergency appeal across major social media platforms to maximize reach and engagement.
subtasks.details: Include share buttons, pre-filled trauma-informed messages, and tracking for social engagement metrics.

subtasks.title: Rapid Deployment Bypass Mechanism
subtasks.description: Develop a rapid deployment bypass to allow immediate publishing of emergency appeals, overriding standard approval workflows when urgent action is required.
subtasks.details: Include audit logging, access controls, and safeguards to prevent misuse while ensuring speed during crises.

subtasks.title: Analytics and Monitoring Setup
subtasks.description: Set up analytics to track appeal performance, donor engagement, notification effectiveness, and social media reach, with a focus on transparency and continuous improvement.
subtasks.details: Implement dashboards for real-time monitoring and reporting. Include metrics relevant to animal protection and trauma-informed outreach.

subtasks.title: Comprehensive Testing and Quality Assurance
subtasks.description: Conduct thorough testing of all emergency appeal features, including trauma-informed content review, integration checks, and user acceptance testing.
subtasks.details: Test for usability, accessibility, security, and performance under time-sensitive conditions. Validate donor trust-building and emergency functionality.

tasks.title: Conduct Final Testing and Launch Preparation
tasks.description: Comprehensive testing across all features, performance validation, and production readiness verification
tasks.details: Execute comprehensive testing including cross-browser compatibility, mobile device testing, accessibility compliance verification, and performance benchmarking. Conduct security audit, validate all integrations, and prepare launch checklist with rollback procedures.
tasks.testStrategy: Run full test suite across all browsers and devices, validate Lighthouse scores >95, confirm all integrations work in production, and verify emergency procedures

subtasks.title: Cross-Browser Compatibility Testing
subtasks.description: Verify the website functions correctly across all major browsers
subtasks.details: Test functionality on Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. Document any rendering inconsistencies, form submission issues, or interactive elements that behave differently across browsers. Pay special attention to trauma-informed content display and emergency appeal functionality.

subtasks.title: Mobile Device Testing
subtasks.description: Ensure responsive design works properly on various mobile devices
subtasks.details: Test on iOS and Android devices with different screen sizes. Verify touch interactions, readability of trauma-informed content, donation form usability on small screens, and emergency appeal visibility. Measure load times on mobile networks.

subtasks.title: Accessibility Compliance Verification
subtasks.description: Validate WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for all website features
subtasks.details: Run automated accessibility scans and manual keyboard navigation tests. Ensure screen readers can properly interpret trauma-informed content. Verify color contrast ratios, alt text for images, and form field labels meet accessibility standards for donor trust-building elements.

subtasks.title: Performance Benchmarking
subtasks.description: Measure and optimize website performance metrics
subtasks.details: Conduct load time analysis, Core Web Vitals assessment, and stress testing for donation processing. Identify performance bottlenecks during emergency appeal scenarios with high traffic. Document baseline metrics for post-launch comparison.

subtasks.title: Security Audit
subtasks.description: Perform comprehensive security testing of all website components
subtasks.details: Conduct vulnerability scanning, penetration testing, and data encryption verification. Test donor information handling security, payment processing systems, and admin access controls. Verify secure handling of sensitive trauma-related content and images.

subtasks.title: Integration Validation
subtasks.description: Test all third-party integrations and data flows
subtasks.details: Verify payment processor connections, email marketing system integration, CRM data synchronization, and social media sharing functionality. Test emergency appeal activation process and donor database integration under various scenarios.

subtasks.title: Launch Checklist Creation
subtasks.description: Develop a comprehensive pre-launch verification checklist
subtasks.details: Create a detailed checklist covering all critical functionality, content accuracy, legal compliance, and technical requirements. Include trauma-informed content review steps, donation flow verification, and emergency appeal activation testing procedures.

subtasks.title: Rollback Procedure Documentation
subtasks.description: Document detailed rollback procedures for emergency situations
subtasks.details: Create step-by-step instructions for reverting to previous stable version if critical issues arise post-launch. Include database restoration procedures, content recovery methods, and communication templates for donors and stakeholders.

subtasks.title: Final Review
subtasks.description: Conduct comprehensive review of all testing results and documentation
subtasks.details: Analyze test results across all categories, identify any remaining issues, and prioritize fixes. Review trauma-informed content presentation, donor trust elements, and emergency appeal functionality with stakeholders. Verify all documentation is complete and accurate.

subtasks.title: Deployment
subtasks.description: Execute the deployment plan and monitor initial performance
subtasks.details: Follow deployment checklist, coordinate with all stakeholders, and implement the website in production environment. Monitor analytics, error logs, and user feedback during initial launch period. Be prepared to activate rollback procedures if necessary.
